title.en: The Heavenly Monarch List is only accessible to...

content.en:
The Heavenly Monarch List is only accessible to the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and there was no Heavenly Monarch List in the New Great Universe before, because there were no strong people in the Heavenly Mandate Realm in the New Great Universe.

But now, a large number of Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouses have poured into the new universe, and the Heavenly Monarch List has naturally been born.

Ye Tian knew about the birth of the Heavenly Monarch List, but he just glanced at it and stopped paying attention to it.

After all, the Heavenly Monarch List is too far away for him at present, and he is far from even qualified to be on the Divine General List now, so what's the point of paying attention to the Heavenly Monarch List?

Moreover, there are only 1,000 on the Heavenly Monarch List, and the strong ones who can make it to the Heavenly Monarch List are definitely the most powerful existences among the Heavenly Monarchs, and they are even expected to defeat the weaker Dao True Ancestors.

After the gods in the chaos and the heavenly monarchs came to the great universe, large forces appeared within the great universe and occupied a large area.

Fortunately, the area of the large universe is too large, and 99% of the area is a terra area, so no one deliberately occupies the area of the human race, the god and demon race, and other races.

Otherwise, in the face of those forces with Heavenly Monarchs, these local forces would not be able to stop them at all.

this day.

Ye Tian was in retreat in the Terran Heavenly Pavilion when a terrifying coercion struck.

Bang!!!!

The Terrans seemed to be shrouded in real terror, and that breath was enough to annihilate the Terrans.

"I don't know which senior?"

Ye Tian stood up.

He was far from being an opponent for those who came, but it was impossible for him to abandon the Terrans, and it was impossible for him to retreat.

Wow!

A young man wearing animal skins appeared in front of Ye Tian, and the other party stared at Ye Tian with a look at the ants, and said: "You are the Ten Thousand Law Divine General, I heard that you are the first divine general of the universe before, and you can have the combat power of a five-star divine general in the universe, and your talent is good, and you are qualified to enter our Huoyun Palace." "

Destiny Realm!

This young man is a powerhouse of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and he is not an ordinary Heavenly Mandate Realm, and the ordinary Heavenly Mandate Realm is not eligible to obtain a quota to enter the Great Universe.

Ye Tian knew that the other party's one finger was enough to kill him countless times.

"Senior, I already have a teacher!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Are you rejecting me?" the young man said coldly: "The master in the universe is just that you have obtained some inheritance, that is not a real teacher, and you can change to another faction at any time." If you dare to refuse, the human race will be extinct today!"

"Senior, do you really want to do this?"

Ye Tian's voice was also cold.

What about the Mandate of Heaven, dare to threaten him.

He is not without a backer, he is a disciple of the Dao Ancestor, and he is not a registered disciple, but an official disciple.

In terms of identity, the young man in front of him is definitely far inferior to him.

"Hey, you're not afraid of me?"

The young man was amazed.

"Do you know who I am taught by?" Ye Tian sneered.

"Haha, what if it's a certain powerful Dao True Ancestor? Now that the True Ancestor can't enter, our Fire Cloud Palace has entered thirty-six Heavenly Monarchs this time, and our Fire Cloud True Ancestor is a powerful True Ancestor. Just because you want to compete with me for background?"

The young man said coldly.

"Really?"

A voice came.

The person who spoke was not Ye Tian, but another person.

Wow!

A young man in gold came out of nothingness, and his appearance made the young man tremble.

"Pengyu Tianjun, why are you here?"

The young man of the Fire Cloud Palace said humbly.

"You are the Yunxiao Heavenly Monarch of the Fire Cloud Palace, do you dare to bully my junior brother?" Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch said.

"Senior brother?"

Yun Xiao Tianjun's expression changed drastically.

Peng Yu Tianjun is the official disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, how precious his identity is, although a group of Dao Ancestor disciples also came in this time, but Peng Yu Tianjun is one of the most terrifying of them.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is one of the Dao Ancestors who likes to accept disciples the most, and the acceptance of disciples is not very strict, and he has a large number of registered disciples.

However, the registered disciples of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not have much weight, and those formal disciples would not regard the registered disciples as junior disciples, and only formal disciples were enough to become the senior brothers of formal disciples.

Pengyu Tianjun called Ye Tian his junior brother, which meant that Ye Tian was an official disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!

In the universe, if you want to become an official disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the difficulty is very high, and the potential is absolutely amazing.

He didn't know how long Ye Tian had been cultivating, thinking that Ye Tian was a god general in the previous universe era, and it took a long time and many opportunities to be promoted to a five-star god general.

Although this is against the sky, it abounds in chaos.

The point was that he didn't understand the situation in the universe and thought that it would not be difficult to cultivate to a five-star god inside the universe.

If he really understood, he would know how demonic Ye Tian was.

"Yes, he is my junior brother, do you want to admit him to the Fire Cloud Palace? If you dare, I won't stop you!"

Pengyu Tianjun said.

"Don't dare, don't dare!"

Yunxiao Tianjun bent down and said humbly.

Immediately, he wanted to leave.

But Peng Yu Tianjun stopped him and said, "If you threaten my junior brother, you want to leave?

"Pengyu Tianjun, how can I catch your claw!"

Yunxiao Heavenly Monarch was extremely frightened.

Peng Yu Tianjun is such a strong person, one move is enough to kill him in seconds!

"I won't kill you, don't worry!"

Peng Yu Tianjun made a move, holding a claw with his right hand and grabbing it with one claw.

In the void, a majestic Chaos Heavenly Peng seemed to appear, piercing through the body of the Yunxiao Heavenly Monarch with incredible speed and power.

In an instant, Yunxiao Heavenly Monarch's body was annihilated by nearly thirty percent.

That's when it happened.

A group of firebirds appeared, took Yunxiao Tianjun away, and left a paragraph: "Pengyu Tianjun, this matter is the fault of my Huoyun Palace, and I hope my subordinates will be merciful!"

"The guy who hides his head and tail!"

Peng Yu Tianjun said disdainfully, but he didn't stop it.

After all, the strength of the Fire Cloud Palace is not weak, and there is no need for him to fight with the Fire Cloud Palace.

"Senior brother, I am your senior brother Peng Yu Tianjun, you can call me Senior Brother Peng Yu!"

Peng Yu Tianjun said with a smile on his face.

Half an hour later.

Ye Tian already knew the identity of Pengyu Tianjun, and was one of the official disciples of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and was instructed by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to protect Ye Tian in the great universe.

After all, Ye Tian is still too weak now, and there are too many gods and heavenly monarchs in the great universe, if there is no one to protect him, any small accident, Ye Tian will die.

"Senior brother, I'll take you to the Void Heaven Palace!"

Pengyu Tianjun said.

The Void Heaven Hall is a force combined by the disciples under the command of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor and the disciples and grandchildren who entered the great universe, and Peng Yu Tianjun took Ye Tian to recognize people, so as not to scare his own people in the future.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Void Heaven Palace.

The Void Heaven Hall is very large, and the interior is like a big world.

At this point,

When many disciples of the Void Heaven Hall saw Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch, they all shouted politely: "I have seen Peng Yu Master Ancestor!"

Immediately, many people looked at Ye Tian.

Peng Yu Tianjun said: "This is your Ten Thousand Master Ancestor, my junior brother!"

"I've seen Master Ten Thousand Ancestors!"

A crowd shouted.

However, their tone was a little awkward.

After all, among these people, some are god generals, and some are heavenly monarchs, how awkward it is to call Ye Tian such a five-star god general as the ancestor.

But there is no way, Ye Tian's seniority is too high, and he is an official disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!

Ye Tian touched his nose and felt quite embarrassed.

"Senior brother, I'll take you to meet your three senior brothers. "

Peng Yu Tianjun spoke.
